tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
It was all a bunch of mush, that I just did not want[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
Paid, was the issue of the day[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
If a girlfriend's got some game[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]
Couldn't be more fly, getting paid was everything[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Shorty can pay her own rent[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]

Do not want to dance if he cannot be everything that I dream of[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]
